name: Mighty Plus
summary: The Storz & Bickel Mighty+, a hybrid portable dry-herb vaporiser for patients who medicate daily.
description: The Mighty+ builds on the original Mighty with hybrid convection and conduction heating, delivering consistent, clean vapour from a ceramic-coated chamber. It heats in around 60 seconds, charges over USB-C with SuperCharge and pass-through use, and runs from 40–210°C for both dry herbs and concentrates. German-engineered with the reliability that made Storz & Bickel a fixture for medical patients, it's backed by a 3-year warranty after registration. It suits a patient who medicates several times a day and wants a device that pays back over years. It's larger and pricier than pocket vapes, so it's a daily-driver rather than a discreet carry.
